title: Silky Umami Ukrainian Pilaf
description: A one-pot dish featuring harissa spice for a bold umami flavor profile in a nut-free-friendly version of traditional Ukrainian pilaf.
instructions: Heat a large pot over medium heat. Add the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Add chopped onion, finely chopped garlic, and sun-dried tomatoes (if using). Sauté for about 5 minutes until fragrant and onions are translucent.
Gradually add rice, ensuring even distribution of broth. Stir occasionally to prevent sticking.
Pour in harissa paste and stir well to evenly coat the rice. Add salt and white pepper according to taste preferences.
Cover the pot with a tight-fitting lid and reduce heat to low. Cook for about 20 minutes or until all liquid is absorbed by the rice.
Remove from heat and let rest covered for an additional 5-10 minutes before serving.
